title: trachyspermum calcicola
intro: Trachyspermum calcicola, also known as Ajwain, is a plant species within the Carrot or Apiaceae family, commonly found in India and other parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its carminative and digestive benefits, which help alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and flatulence. The health benefits of Trachyspermum calcicola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, or dried seeds for medicinal use, making it a widely used ingredient in traditional Indian medicine and cooking.
